author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Design doc committed at .design/unified-device-tensor.md. Key decisions: 1) StorageBuffer gets Cuda variant, 2) GpuBackend trait in core (no circular dep), 3) GpuBufferHandle is type-erased (Box<dyn Any>), 4) ops dispatch via match on device(), 5) autograd unchanged, 6) Module::to(device) moves params. 5-step implementation plan, ~25 files touched.
